(*ast.Program)({
	EOFToken: (token.Token) {
		Position: (token.Position) {
			Line: (int) 1,
			Column: (int) 0
		},
		Type: (token.Type) 0,
		Literal: (string) "",
		LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) (len=1) {
			(token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 1,
					Column: (int) 0
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 26,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) "\n",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			}
		},
		AfterNewline: (bool) true
	},
	Stmts: ([]ast.Node) (len=1) {
		(*ast.FuncDecl)({
			FunctionToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 0,
					Column: (int) 0
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 30,
				Literal: (string) (len=8) "function",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			LparenToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 0,
					Column: (int) 12
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 22,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) "(",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			RparenToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 0,
					Column: (int) 13
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 23,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) ")",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			Name: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 0,
					Column: (int) 9
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 1,
				Literal: (string) (len=3) "foo",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			Body: (*ast.Block)({
				LbraceToken: (token.Token) {
					Position: (token.Position) {
						Line: (int) 0,
						Column: (int) 15
					},
					Type: (token.Type) 24,
					Literal: (string) (len=1) "{",
					LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
					AfterNewline: (bool) false
				},
				RbraceToken: (token.Token) {
					Position: (token.Position) {
						Line: (int) 0,
						Column: (int) 16
					},
					Type: (token.Type) 25,
					Literal: (string) (len=1) "}",
					LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
					AfterNewline: (bool) false
				},
				Stmts: ([]ast.Node) <nil>
			})
		})
	}
})
